steps.goal: Add a new fact about a fellow Latina scholar or writer in their network to document their contributions
Update an existing fact about someone when their circumstances or work changes
Generate a summary of a cultural project or person to have a consolidated overview

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about preserving and sharing Latino heritage. Values documentation of community members' achievements and maintains detailed records of cultural projects.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about people and projects in their cultural network but relies on the knowledge graph system to track and organize this information. Does not know internal tool names or APIs.

end_condition: The user has added a new fact, updated an existing fact, and generated a summary for an entity in their knowledge graph.
goals: Add a new fact about a fellow Latina scholar or writer in their network to document their contributions
